# Manager | Nora Studio

[Nora Studio](https://voki.pages.dev/index.html)
[Back to Site](https://voki.pages.dev/index.html)

# Nora Studio Manager
Log in with Discord to configure your servers and manage your preferences.

## Select a Server
Showing servers where you have administrative access.

## Server Name
Manage incoming member flow and automated defenses.
Automate punishments for repeat offenders.
Syncs directly with Discord's native AutoMod engine.
Track server activity and send reports to a specific channel.
Reward active users with ranks and roles.
Require CAPTCHA before users can see the server.
Private ticket management system.
Create an interactive panel where users click buttons to get roles.
Select the LLM driving Nora's behavior in this server for /ask commands.
These actions affect core bot functionality. Owner only.
Enable or disable specific commands for this server. Disabled commands will not appear in the Discord slash menu.

## My Preferences
Customize the look of Nora Studio Manager.
Show smaller server cards to fit more on screen.
Manage how your user data is stored across Nora-enabled servers.
